mapper.select: SELECT id AS "id", department_id AS "departmentId", month AS "month", status AS "status", ai_generated AS "aiGenerated", ai_summary AS "aiSummary", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", published_at AS "publishedAt" FROM follow_up_shift_plan WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND month = #{month} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", department_id AS "departmentId", month AS "month", status AS "status", ai_generated AS "aiGenerated", ai_summary AS "aiSummary", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt", published_at AS "publishedAt" FROM follow_up_shift_plan WHERE id = #{planId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_shift_plan SET status = #{status}, published_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'published' THEN NOW() ELSE published_at END WHERE id = #{planId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_staff_shift ( plan_id, employee_id, department_id, work_date, shift_type, status ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{employeeId}, #{departmentId}, #{workDate}, COALESCE(#{shiftType}, 'full'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'planned') )

INSERT INTO follow_up_shift_contact_task ( shift_id, register_id, priority_level, status ) VALUES ( #{shiftId}, #{registerId}, COALESCE(#{priorityLevel}, 'normal'), COALESCE(#{status}, 'planned') ) ON CONFLICT (shift_id, register_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS "id", t.shift_id AS "shiftId", t.register_id AS "registerId", r.real_name AS "patientName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", t.priority_level AS "priorityLevel", t.status AS "status", t.completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t LEFT JOIN register r ON r.id = t.register_id WHERE t.shift_id = #{shiftId} ORDER BY CASE t.priority_level WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, r.real_name

SELECT t.id AS "id", t.shift_id AS "shiftId", t.register_id AS "registerId", r.real_name AS "patientName", t.priority_level AS "priorityLevel", t.status AS "status" FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t LEFT JOIN register r ON r.id = t.register_id WHERE t.shift_id IN
#{id}

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.plan_id AS "planId", s.employee_id AS "employeeId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.work_date AS "workDate", s.shift_type AS "shiftType", s.status AS "status" FROM follow_up_staff_shift s WHERE s.id = #{shiftId} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id AS "id", e.realname AS "name", e.deptment_id AS "departmentId" FROM employee e INNER JOIN users u ON u.employee_id = e.id AND u.user_type = 7 AND u.status = 1 WHERE e.deptment_id = #{departmentId} AND (e.delmark IS NULL OR e.delmark = 0) ORDER BY e.realname

SELECT fe.register_id AS "registerId", COALESCE(fe.priority_level, 'normal') AS "priority", fe.monitoring_employee_id AS "monitorEmployeeId", ( SELECT MAX(c.contact_date) FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.register_id = fe.register_id ) AS "lastContactDate", fe.follow_up_deadline AS "deadlineDate" FROM follow_up_enrollment fe WHERE fe.managing_department_id = #{departmentId} AND fe.status = 'active' ORDER BY fe.priority_level, fe.register_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_shift_change_request ( employee_id, department_id, original_shift_id, requested_work_date, reason, status ) VALUES ( #{employeeId}, #{departmentId}, #{originalShiftId}, #{requestedWorkDate}, #{reason}, 'pending' )
mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS "id", r.employee_id AS "employeeId", r.department_id AS "departmentId", r.original_shift_id AS "originalShiftId", r.requested_work_date AS "requestedWorkDate", r.reason AS "reason", r.status AS "status" FROM follow_up_shift_change_request r WHERE r.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_shift_change_request WHERE status = 'pending'
AND department_id = #{departmentId}

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.plan_id AS "planId", s.employee_id AS "employeeId", s.work_date AS "workDate", s.status AS "status" FROM follow_up_staff_shift s WHERE s.plan_id = #{planId} AND s.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND s.work_date = #{workDate} AND s.status != 'cancelled' LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS "id", t.shift_id AS "shiftId", t.register_id AS "registerId", s.work_date AS "workDate" FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t INNER JOIN follow_up_staff_shift s ON s.id = t.shift_id WHERE t.register_id = #{registerId} AND s.work_date = #{workDate} LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS "shiftId", s.plan_id AS "planId", p.month AS "month", p.status AS "planStatus", s.employee_id AS "employeeId", e.realname AS "employeeName", s.work_date AS "workDate", ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t WHERE t.shift_id = s.id ) AS "taskCount" FROM follow_up_staff_shift s INNER JOIN follow_up_shift_plan p ON p.id = s.plan_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = s.employee_id WHERE s.department_id = #{departmentId} AND s.work_date >= #{from} AND s.work_date <= #{to} AND s.status != 'cancelled' AND p.status IN ('draft', 'published') ORDER BY s.work_date ASC, s.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task WHERE shift_id = #{shiftId}
